case_title: MOLLY S. BONNEY VS. NATALIE SMITH ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-26-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-26-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF MOLLEY S. BONNEY APPEARED. DEFENDANT GREGORY SMITH APPEARED. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT NATALIE SMITH. PROOFS OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM DANIEL FLEISIG, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-26-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BONNEY, MOLLY S. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, NATALIE $8,393.95 PRINCIPAL, $165.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,558.95, DEFENSE VERDICT FOR DEFENDANT GREGORY SMITH STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BONNEY, MOLLY S. AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, NATALIE SMITH, GREGORY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-27-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$45.00) SERVED JUN-12-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, GREGORY
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY BONNEY, MOLLY S. SMITH, GREGORY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-27-2023 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO OCT-26-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF NOTIFIED BY PHONE. DEFENDANTS HAVE NO PHONE NUMBER ON FILE BUT PLAINTIFF PROVIDED A PHONE NUMBER FOR NATALIE SMITH (VOICE MAILBOX FULL - UNABLE TO LEAVE VOICEMAIL). CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$45.00) SERVED JUN-11-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, NATALIE
